---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement to planning, review, or export workflows
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement you want to see.

## Why this matters

Explain the practical benefit. Good examples:

- clearer review workflow
- safer fallback behavior
- easier local setup
- better API contract
- more honest public UX

## Constraints

List any constraints or non-goals.

## Extra context

Examples, sketches, related APIs, or prior art.
